name: @stackra/console
purpose: Artisan-style CLI framework for the workspace — @Command()-driven registration, DISCOVERY_SERVICE auto-discovery, styled output, stub scaffolding.
capabilities: Publishing subpath for cross-package stub sharing
when_to_use: You need a workspace CLI or per-package artisan-style commands for scaffolding, cache clears, or maintenance tasks.
when_not_to_use: For app-side runtime scheduling use @stackra/scheduler; for background jobs use @stackra/queue.
